title: AQC
description: Discrete adiabatic quantum linear system solver (QLSP). Solves Ax = b via a Trotterized discrete adiabatic evolution with system qubits and ancillary qubits.

params.help: Number of system qubits n, determining the linear system dimension N = 2^n. Larger values increase circuit depth significantly (n > 6 is impractical).
params.name: n
params.info: 请输入 1-6 的整数，系统量子比特数，矩阵维度 N=2^n

params.help: Number of discrete adiabatic evolution steps. Set to 0 for auto-selection based on condition number (T ≈ 10·κ). Larger values improve accuracy at the cost of circuit depth. Must be even.
params.name: T
params.info: 请输入非负整数，0 表示自动选择。步数越多精度越高，但线路深度越大

params.help: Adiabatic schedule parameter p controlling the evolution rate. Must be > 1. Default 1.4 provides a good balance between accuracy and speed.
params.name: p
params.info: 请输入 >1 的浮点数，默认 1.4。控制绝热演化速率
